error_signature: unable to redirect to external URL using workflow
title: Cannot redirect to external URL in workflow
symptom: The workflow does not redirect the user to the payment authorization URL despite the correct URL being set in the 'change page' action.
applies_when: Attempting to redirect in a workflow
not_this_if: Using a different method to open URLs
root_cause: The 'change page' action in the workflow does not support redirection to external URLs. Instead, it is designed for internal navigation within the application, which leads to the failure in redirecting users to the payment page.
fix_steps: Add a 'custom Javascript' action in your workflow
Replace 'yourAuthorizationURL' with the dynamic URL variable
agent_instruction: Implement a 'custom Javascript' action to use 'window.open()' for redirection.
